Package es.ubu.lsi.client

Class ChatClientImpl

java.lang.Object
es.ubu.lsi.client.ChatClientImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ChatClient
public class ChatClientImpl extends Object implements ChatClient
Client.
Author:
http://www.dreamincode.net, Raúl Marticorena, Joaquin P. Seco

  • Method Details

    • start

      public boolean start()
      Starts chat.
      Specified by:
      start in interface ChatClient
      Returns:
      true if everything goes right, false in other case

    • display

      private void display(String msg)
      Displays messages.
      Parameters:
      msg - text to show in console

      Parameters:
      msg - message

      public void disconnect()
      Disconnect client closing resources.
      Specified by:
      disconnect in interface ChatClient

    • banUser

      private void banUser(String bannedUser)
      Bans a user in the current client.
      Parameters:
      bannedUser - user to ban

    • unbanUser

      private void unbanUser(String unbannedUser)
      Unbans a user in the current client.
      Parameters:
      unbannedUser - user to unban

    • isMessageFromBannedUser

      private boolean isMessageFromBannedUser(String text)
      Checks if a received text belongs to a banned user.
      Parameters:
      text - received text
      Returns:
      true if the message belongs to a banned user, false in other case

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Starts the client from console. Valid examples: java es.ubu.lsi.client.ChatClientImpl juan java es.ubu.lsi.client.ChatClientImpl localhost juan
      Parameters:
      args - command-line arguments
